Pandowdy Apple IIe Emulator
Table of Contents

Class WindowSettings

Namespace
Pandowdy.UI.Models
Assembly
Pandowdy.UI.dll

Represents saved window position, size, and state information.

public sealed class WindowSettings
Inheritance
object
WindowSettings
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Remarks

Used to persist and restore window layout across application sessions, with support for multi-monitor configurations and DPI awareness.

Properties

Height

Gets or sets the window height in pixels.

public int Height { get; set; }

Property Value

int

IsMaximized

Gets or sets whether the window was maximized when saved.

public bool IsMaximized { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Left

Gets or sets the X coordinate of the window's top-left corner in screen coordinates.

public int Left { get; set; }

Property Value

int

MonitorBounds

Gets or sets the monitor's bounds when the window was saved.

public string? MonitorBounds { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Remarks

Format: "X,Y,Width,Height" (e.g., "0,0,1920,1080" for primary monitor). Used to validate that the saved position is still valid if monitor configuration changed.

MonitorName

Gets or sets the name of the monitor the window was on when saved.

public string? MonitorName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Remarks

Used to detect when a saved monitor is no longer available (disconnected). Falls back to primary monitor in that case.

Top

Gets or sets the Y coordinate of the window's top-left corner in screen coordinates.

public int Top { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Width

Gets or sets the window width in pixels.

public int Width { get; set; }

Property Value

int
